entity.summary: Core Chain decentralized exchange and DeFi platform with token swaps, liquidity pools, farms, and related ecosystem features. HEI retains ArcherSwap as active because its official root site and documentation remain available and current market pairs continue to be reported.
entity.notes: The former exchange.archerswap.finance app subdomain no longer resolves, but the official root site and documentation remain live. HEI therefore treats the monitoring DNS failure as an outdated-URL issue rather than evidence that the protocol is inactive or dead. Launch year is stored at year precision from the current exchange profile source.

events.title: ArcherSwap established on Core Chain
events.description: ArcherSwap began operating as a decentralized exchange and DeFi platform in the Core Chain ecosystem.
events.notes: The available exchange profile identifies 2023 as the establishment year; the exact launch day has not been established, so HEI stores a year-level date.

evidence.title: ArcherSwap official Core Chain site
evidence.notes: Current official root site used to verify that the project remains publicly available after the former exchange subdomain stopped resolving.

evidence.title: CoinGecko ArcherSwap exchange profile and current markets
evidence.notes: Profile identifies ArcherSwap as a decentralized exchange established in 2023 and lists current trading pairs.

evidence.title: Meet ArcherSwap
evidence.notes: Official documentation describes ArcherSwap as a platform for trading, earning, and gaming and documents its exchange features.
